title: Part 3 - Tutorial 2: Getting Started with InfluxDB

resources.title: Part 1: An Introduction to Time Series
resources.evidence_quote: We talked about this briefly in the very first part of this course, an introduction to time series.

resources.title: Flux Workshop: Writing Your First Flux
resources.evidence_quote: The next workshop will be this week, and it will be focusing on writing your first flux. Make sure to catch that.

resources.title: InfluxDB 2 Templates
resources.evidence_quote: One of the coolest things about InfluxDB's latest version, version two, is templates. We will be spending also a significant amount of time on using the GetOps pattern to apply our telegraph configurations, our dashboards and our tasks using InfluxDB two templates.

resources.title: Telegraf Data Collector
resources.evidence_quote: You can start to specify and configure Telegraph, or you could just say, I will do this later, which is what we're going to choose now.
